scope: P2 secondary and northern half-beast reusable character design specs
global_continuity_rules: Grounded eastern epic fantasy; restrained low-magic; worn but readable materials.
P2 characters should be distinct by profession and faction at first glance, without overpowering P1 leads.
Field-worn clothing may be dusty, patched, burned, or repaired, but it should remain clean, purposeful, and modelable rather than shredded beggar rags.
Requested main or recurring characters need at least two readable costume states when used for modeling.

Northern beast and half-beast characters are humanoid people with clear animal ears or localized beast traits, noble textiles, and practical winter construction; they are not ordinary humans with animal jewelry and not full animals.
Northern noble costumes use thick rare furs, bone-gold fittings, jade or aurora beads, and cold-region embroidery to show rank and culture.
Lower Qingming insect military characters such as Li Tang are not human-shaped officers; they need large non-human insect anatomy, hardened shell skin, arm blades, and caste-specific combat bodies.
Zhaoming symbols, when visible, use symbol_zhaoming_sunmoon_v03: a moon-white crescent inside a worn golden sun wheel as one fused badge.
Sumin symbols, when visible, use symbol_suming_whitewing_blackhalo_v03: abstract white wings covering a haloed black sun.

characters.name: 罗青禾
characters.role: 37-year-old village medic, Shen Weisang's mother, old relay sign keeper
characters.design_goal: Make her feel like a grounded Canyang Ao healer and the beautiful, resilient 37-year-old emotional source of the escort promise; plain cloth and smoke dust cannot hide her striking beauty.
characters.silhouette: graceful 37-year-old village healer, compact practical layers, protective forward lean when shielding a child or patient, mature beauty without old-woman frailty
characters.face_hair: strikingly beautiful 37-year-old mother, clear bone structure, warm but resilient eyes, practical concentration, light village-work fatigue but not elderly; hair covered or tied under a blue-green cloth head wrap

wardrobe_states.description: clean plain medic clothing in muted gray, herb green, blue-green, and restrained earth brown; intact apron, rolled cuffs, herb stains, and smoke dust, never ragged
same village silhouette with a darker blue-green outer wrap, hidden relay marks on medicine drawer planks, and a half Sun-Moon token concealed in ordinary healer objects
smoke-dusted and wounded final state with scorched but still coherent clothing, beauty and dignity still visible through ash and exhaustion

fixed_props: medicine cabinet drawer or plank with hidden relay signs
half Sun-Moon relay token handoff prop
pose_and_expression_anchors: uses herb names as cover for old relay signs
shields others before explaining
deathbed handoff posture should be intimate and restrained

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical character sheet with half-body, full-body, medicine-house daily state, relay-keeper hidden state, fire deathbed state, herb basket close-up, hidden relay sign detail, relay token handoff detail

continuity_locks: beautiful 37-year-old grounded local medic
plain or coarse cloth must not hide her beauty
no priestess glamour
must not read as an old woman
head cloth and herb basket must remain
old relay signs should be hidden in ordinary medicine-house material rather than displayed as magic
negative_notes: no dull face hidden by brown cloth
characters.downstream_usage: Used for episode 01 memory/deathbed references, Canyang Ao medicine-house blocking, and Shen Weisang family continuity.

characters.name: 孟归藏
characters.role: Old Book Society witness and burned archive keeper
characters.design_goal: Make him an ash-damaged witness who protects evidence, not an elegant scholar or generic beggar.
characters.silhouette: thin adult scholar-traveler, hunched protectively around a burned book box, suspicious shoulders and quick hands
characters.face_hair: one burned brow, ash stains, sharp archival eyes, smoke-dried messy hair

wardrobe_states.description: dark patched scholar-traveler clothing with clean structure, paper-yellow lining, bone-clip utility ties, and a guarded book-box harness
same silhouette after archive fire, with scorched sleeve edge, soot-stained wrap, and carefully bound manuscript scraps

pose_and_expression_anchors: protects pages before people, then regrets it
speaks through fragments and evidence
turns his unburned side toward threat while guarding the book box

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical character sheet with half-body, full-body, archive-keeper state, burned-witness state, page-guarding pose, burned brow close-up, book box and bone clip detail

continuity_locks: must show fire damage
not elegant scholar
not a beggar despite patched clothing
book box and bone clips must remain
burn scars and ash should be specific but not horror-gore
characters.downstream_usage: Used for gray-ash archive witness scenes, exposition about book burning and Qingming identifier history, and prop close-ups of charred documents.

characters.name: 鹿弥
characters.role: beautiful northern Frosthoof noble half-beast shaman and disaster-source seeker
characters.design_goal: Make her a visibly half-beast northern noble: very beautiful, clear deer ears, rare fur luxury, and high-status Frosthoof culture rather than a plain traveler with understated clan hints.
characters.silhouette: slender young noble built for snow travel, elegant neck line, clear deer ears rising from the hood or hair, thick fur shoulder volume, light-footed but aristocratic posture
characters.face_hair: very beautiful young northern noble woman, bright cold eyes, clear deer ears with fine inner fur, braided dark hair or pale-brown hair threaded with jade and bone-gold beads; optional small ritual antler crown worn as ornament, not grown full antlers

wardrobe_states.description: ice-blue brocade inner robe, silver-gray riding skirt or fitted snow layers, white deer and silver fox fur mantle, bone-gold clasps, jade or aurora beads, clean thick boots
more practical snow-travel version with fur-lined hood cut around visible deer ears, layered gray-blue cloak, herb pouches, bone flute, and weatherproof bindings
ceremonial northern state with moon-white fur cape, antler-shaped headdress jewelry, cold-blue embroidery, ritual tassels, and bone flute presented with restrained sacred authority

fixed_props: rare white deer or silver fox fur mantle
pose_and_expression_anchors: listens to wind through bone flute
protects injured young beast first
keeps body angled as if reading snow and wind
noble composure should remain even in travel clothing

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical character sheet with noble snow full-body, disaster-seeker travel full-body, shaman ritual state, deer-ear close-up, fur mantle detail, bone flute and snow herb pouch detail

continuity_locks: must be a northern half-beast woman with clear deer ears
must be very beautiful
must read as northern nobility through rare fur, bone-gold, jade, and brocade
bone flute must remain
should read as northern disaster-source seeker, not generic forest druid
negative_notes: no ordinary human with only antler jewelry
characters.downstream_usage: Used for northern tribe contact, frost-hoof cultural continuity, snowfield blocking, shaman ritual boards, and bone flute prop continuity.

characters.name: 厉螳
characters.role: lower Qingming mantis combat-caste enforcer of the Armor Army Office
characters.design_goal: Make him the direct physical military threat: tall, strong, non-human, and heavily insectoid, clearly separate from Bai Yi's clean human-ruler disguise and upper-caste bureaucratic menace.
characters.silhouette: towering non-human mantis caste body, forward-heavy thorax, long bent digitigrade legs, hard shoulder shell, two primary arm blades plus secondary grasping limbs, head lowered like a cutting weapon
characters.face_hair: no human hair and no normal human face; triangular mantis head, faceted black-green eyes, mandible plates, scarred chitin ridges, aggressive predatory stillness

wardrobe_states.description: black-green hardened shell skin with old iron command clamps, dark military mantle strapped around the thorax, gate-order token fixed to chest harness
arm blades exposed and polished at the edge, mud-streaked lower legs, reinforced chitin plates, practical pursuit harness, no decorative heroic armor

marks: blade scratches and field dents across chitin plates
pose_and_expression_anchors: uses direct force and cuts through bureaucracy
stands too close when threatening
occupies doorways and gates like a weapon
arm blades should define the threat line in silhouette

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical creature-character sheet with full-body, side view, threat pose, arm blade close-up, hardened shell skin study, iron gate token close-up, combat pursuit state

continuity_locks: non-human insectoid mantis combat caste
distinct from Bai Yi: darker, martial, less clean, more physical
must have arm blades and hardened skin
must not become a human officer with mantis-themed armor
must not become polished heroic armor
negative_notes: no ordinary spear replacing the arm blades
characters.downstream_usage: Used for Armor Army Office pursuit, Hanya Fort control, martial threat boards, direct confrontation frames, and lower Qingming combat-caste modeling.

characters.name: 顾怀章
characters.role: southern teacher and pressure voice for Yan Nanzhi
characters.design_goal: Make him a southern old-imperial scholar whose clothing preserves imperial luxury after 1200 years while adapting to humid heat; he pressures Yan Nanzhi through ritual duty, not frontline combat.
characters.silhouette: upright older ritual scholar, narrow vertical poise, layered but breathable southern robe volume, old court discipline, mostly still and frontal as if appearing in memory or edict
characters.face_hair: older adult with controlled severity, tired eyes, restrained southern teacher authority; hair and beard neat, humidity-softened at the edges but not careless

wardrobe_states.description: light silk-hemp and gauze layers in vermilion, peacock blue, vine green, ivory, and old gold; open sleeve vents and breathable collar construction for humid southern weather
brighter old-imperial ritual robe with Ming-style broad-sleeve memory, woven gold edging, lacquered rain-resistant scroll case, and controlled court geometry
darker travel state with light rain cloak, sealed red cord scroll, folded imperial robe fragment hidden inside waterproof lacquer tube

pose_and_expression_anchors: places duty above safety
appears through memory, letter, or blood-treaty instruction in season 01
holds a scroll like an accusation rather than an ornament
southern heat adaptation should be visible in fabric weight and sleeve construction

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical memory-reference sheet with southern edict state, imperial ritual scholar state, secret-letter travel state, scroll-instruction pose, robe construction detail, red cord scroll and lacquer tube close-up

continuity_locks: do not overuse as present character unless series route is revised
should read as pressure voice from memory and blood-treaty instruction
must preserve old-imperial luxury but adapt it to humid southern climate
old imperial marks may appear in memory or formal state, but travel props keep sensitive marks hidden
negative_notes: no warm mentor softness dominating the design
no complete palace costume that ignores southern humidity
characters.downstream_usage: Used for Yan Nanzhi memory inserts, blood-treaty command frames, southern teacher visual continuity, and old-imperial southern costume references.

characters.name: 赫连雪岱
characters.role: Frosthoof deer half-beast noble guard and Lu Mi's household retainer
characters.design_goal: Provide a northern noble guard model who shows how Frosthoof deer half-beasts differ from Lu Mi while sharing rank culture, rare fur, and visible beast traits.
characters.silhouette: tall young female guard, strong straight posture, clear deer ears, small polished antler stubs or antler-shaped guard ornaments, broad white fur shoulder mantle over fitted riding armor
characters.face_hair: beautiful severe northern face, clear deer ears, high cheekbones, dark braided hair threaded with bone-gold rings, calm watchful eyes

wardrobe_states.description: silver-gray leather riding armor under moon-white deer fur, ice-blue sash, bone-gold clasp, jade rank beads, clean ceremonial boots
heavier hooded fur cloak cut around deer ears, reinforced bracers, short spear, snow goggles lifted to brow, weather-stained but well-maintained layers

pose_and_expression_anchors: stands between Lu Mi and threat without theatrical aggression
keeps spear vertical in court state
snow patrol stance lowers the center of gravity

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical character sheet with noble guard court state, snow patrol state, deer-ear close-up, white fur mantle detail, spear and jade rank bead close-up

continuity_locks: visible deer ears required
must read as northern noble guard, not generic hunter
rare fur and bone-gold fittings show status
distinct from Lu Mi by guard armor and severe stance
negative_notes: no ordinary human guard with horn jewelry only
characters.downstream_usage: Used as Frosthoof noble guard reference, northern court lineup contrast, and secondary half-beast modeling sample.

characters.name: 乌岚
characters.role: black-wolf half-beast snow scout and border messenger
characters.design_goal: Provide a wolf-line northern scout with clear animal ears, agile winter gear, and a darker palette that contrasts with Frosthoof nobility.
characters.silhouette: lean adult scout, black wolf ears, low tail visible under cloak split, compact bow line, crouched wind-reading posture
characters.face_hair: sharp golden eyes, wind-burned face, black wolf ears, dark hair braided close to head, alert but not savage expression

wardrobe_states.description: dark blue and charcoal fitted snow layers, black wolf fur collar, leather chest straps, short bow, bone signal whistle
muted gray-blue cloak with message tube under the arm, ear-covering hood partly pushed back so wolf ears still read clearly

pose_and_expression_anchors: reads tracks with one hand near the snow
turns one ear toward off-screen sound
keeps messages hidden but accessible

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical character sheet with border scout state, hidden messenger state, wolf-ear close-up, tail and cloak split detail, short bow and message tube close-up

continuity_locks: visible wolf ears required
low tail should be visible without turning the design into a full wolf
must read as scout and messenger rather than noble guard
winter clothing stays clean and maintained
negative_notes: no ordinary human with a wolf necklace
characters.downstream_usage: Used as northern scout reference, border messenger blocking, and wolf half-beast modeling sample.

characters.name: 拓跋砚熊
characters.role: white-bear half-beast shield guard and snow-forge craftsman
characters.design_goal: Provide a heavier northern beast-line body type for modeling: protective, strong, and materially distinct from deer and wolf half-beasts.
characters.silhouette: broad powerful adult, rounded white-bear ears, thick neck, heavy fur side cape, large shield and forge hammer silhouette, steady protective stance
characters.face_hair: wide calm face, white-bear ears, short frost-pale hair and beard, scarred nose bridge, kind but immovable gaze

wardrobe_states.description: white bear fur side cape, black iron lamellar plates, dark teal padded winter tunic, bone-iron shield, clean heavy boots
fur-lined leather apron over winter tunic, forge gloves, hammer, soot at cuffs, bear ears still visible above tied head wrap

pose_and_expression_anchors: uses body as a wall
rests one hand on shield rim
forge state should show craft skill, not brute stupidity

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical character sheet with shield guard state, snow forge state, bear-ear close-up, shield detail, forge hammer and apron detail

continuity_locks: visible bear ears required
broad half-beast body type distinct from deer and wolf characters
must read as protective guard and craftsman
white fur should be rare and well-kept, not dirty ragged pelt
characters.downstream_usage: Used as bear half-beast body-type reference, northern shield guard blocking, and snow-forge prop continuity.

characters.name: 青翎鸦见
characters.role: snow-raven half-beast courier and omen reader
characters.design_goal: Provide an avian northern half-beast with readable localized traits, refined courier clothing, and a different movement language from the mammal-line characters.
characters.silhouette: slim adult courier, raven-feather ear crests, short layered feather mantle, narrow cloak, light climbing boots, message tube at the ribs
characters.face_hair: pale face with black-blue eye makeup or natural dark feather markings, raven-feather ear crests instead of normal animal ears, glossy black hair tied high, quick assessing eyes

wardrobe_states.description: black-blue feather mantle, silver-thread gray tunic, bone clasp, narrow waterproof cloak, polished message tube
hooded wind cloak shaped around feather crests, strapped climbing boots, sealed message tubes, snow-darkened lower hem but intact clothing

pose_and_expression_anchors: tilts head as if hearing distant storm changes
keeps one hand on message tube seal
movement should feel quick and precise rather than mystical floating

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical character sheet with courier formal state, storm runner state, feather-crest close-up, short feather mantle detail, message tube and boot detail

continuity_locks: visible raven-feather ear crests required
must remain humanoid half-beast rather than winged monster
must read as courier and omen reader through props and movement
clothing remains refined and practical
negative_notes: no ordinary human with feather earrings only
characters.downstream_usage: Used as avian half-beast modeling sample, northern courier reference, and message-route blocking continuity.

lineup_board.purpose: One board comparing P2 secondary characters and northern beast or half-beast modeling samples so their faction, profession, age, anatomy, costume states, and material language stay distinct.
lineup_board.layout: vertical lineup board with nine simplified full-body figures, two-state costume thumbnails for recurring characters, beast-trait callouts, and prop callouts; no readable text labels

assumptions: The user-requested P2 batch includes char_gu_huaizhang_v01 even though the registry currently marks him priority 3.
Northern beast and half-beast additions are project-level modeling references, not necessarily all episode-01 speaking roles.
This is a project-level reusable asset pass, matching existing P1 files, not a detached episode-specific art-room run.
quality_notes: Each character has a stable output path under assets/characters/v01 and prompt traceability.
The batch now matches the updated character locks for Lu Mi as a visible northern deer half-beast noble and Li Tang as a non-human mantis combat caste.
Costume states are explicit enough for model sheets while leaving shot-specific pose and lighting to downstream art-room prompts.
